# Route handler details for POST and PUT (2026-03-10 11:21Z)

_**User**_

Search through ALL route files in `d:\web development\test\server\routes\` to find every POST and PUT route handler. For each, identify:
1. The route path (e.g., `router.post('/login', ...)`)
2. What fields are destructured from `req.body`
3. The file it's in

Only look at these files:
- server/routes/auth.js
- server/routes/agent.js
- server/routes/admin.js
- server/routes/superadmin.js
- server/routes/wallboard.js
- server/routes/asterisk.js

Return a complete list in table format: File | Route | Method | Body Fields
